name: tab-context-menu-file-actions
title: Tab context menu file actions

entries.note: Started execution from the confirmed lightweight plan after locating Tab.svelte, ContextMenu.svelte, i18n, and existing Tauri commands.
Added a RED test for tab file action metadata; it fails as expected because tabFileActions.js/helper does not exist yet.
Implemented and verified the tab file action helper with a focused tsx node:test run.
Connected the helper to Tab.svelte: the tab context menu now includes copy-path and open-file-location actions using existing Tauri commands, disabled for non-file tabs.
Added English and Polish labels for copy full path and open file location; other languages fall back to English through the existing i18n helper.
Moved the focused node:test file from src to scripts so svelte-check does not require Node type declarations for application sources.

verification.outcome: PASS: focused tab file action test passed with 2 node:test cases.
PASS: svelte-check completed with 0 errors and existing warnings only.
PASS: production frontend build completed successfully; existing Svelte/Vite warnings remain.

final_result: Done: tab context menu has Copy Full Path and Open File Location actions, disabled for tabs without a real file path; focused test, svelte-check, and frontend build passed.
